subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of Abdul Baha! Material friendship is not permanent; for every kind of love which is not purely for the sake of God is ended in hatred.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء یاران جسمانی مارانند زیرا هر محبتی که لله نباشد عاقبت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @call to action, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
